title: Plan shipping and customs for 500x T-Echo procurement
description: After quote/PO, handle bulk shipping from Shenzhen (DHL/FedEx recommended for speed), customs clearance for electronics (FCC/CE certs available), insurance, delivery to dev lab. Estimate total landed cost including duties. Link to procurement bead. Acceptance: logistics plan documented, potential vendors/forwarders listed.
notes:
**LICHEN T-Echo 500-unit Logistics Plan (DHL/Customs/Costs)**

**Shipping Recommendation:** DHL Express preferred for speed and reliability (air, 3-7 day delivery Shenzhen->Seattle). For ~125-200kg total (unit ~200-400g packaged), expect multi-box shipment. Business account for discounts. Documentation: commercial invoice (detailed description 'nRF52840 LoRa dev board with GPS/e-ink', accurate value, HS code), packing list, airway bill. Get formal quote from DHL sales. Alternative: FedEx International Priority or freight forwarder for >150kg. Estimated shipping: ,000-,000 depending on rate/kg (~0-45/kg).

**Customs & Import:** Formal entry (> 00 value). Engage US licensed customs broker (e.g. via DHL brokerage or independent). HS code recommendation: 8517.62.00 (transmission apparatus) or 8543.70.99 (electrical machines). Typical base duty 0-5.3%; check current US tariffs on Chinese electronics (Section 301 may add 7.5-25% but many dev boards have exclusions or duty drawback potential). Required: FCC/CE compliance docs (available from LilyGO), Certificate of Origin if claiming preference, commercial docs. Clearance fees ~50-750 + any duties. No FDA/USDA for these devices. Delivery to dev lab in Seattle, WA.

**Insurance:** Recommend all-risk cargo insurance for full value +10% ( ~1-2% of goods value, ~50-450). Carrier basic coverage often insufficient for electronics.

**Landed Cost Estimate (base assumption 8/unit from prior procurement research, adjust per final quote):**
- Procurement: 9,000
- Shipping: ,500 (mid)
- Duties/Tariffs: 50 (est 4%)
- Brokerage/Clearance/Handling: 50
- Insurance + inland to lab: 50
- **Total ~7,350 (~4.70/unit landed). Range: 0-62/unit depending on negotiations/tariffs.**

**Recommended Partners/Forwarders:**
1. DHL Express + Brokerage (one-stop, tracking, volume pricing) - contact business development for account.
2. LilyGO direct logistics support (ask sales@ or info@lilygo.cc for DDP quote).
3. Digital forwarder like Flexport or ShipBob for visibility and compliance help (good for electronics).
Pros: DHL fastest. Cons: higher cost vs ocean (not suitable for time-sensitive).

**Risks & Mitigations:** Tariff changes (monitor USTR), customs delay on radio equipment (pre-clear with docs), damage (insurance + proper packaging), lead time variance (buffer 2 weeks). Recommend Incoterms DDP if LilyGO offers to simplify.

Plan documented entirely in Beads per instructions. No MD files created. Children broken out and addressed. Ready for PO execution. Sources: standard trade practices, CBP guidelines, DHL business resources (quotes recommended for precision). 

Linked to procurement bead project-LICHEN-2h1i.1.1.
close_reason: Logistics plan for 500 T-Echo fully documented in Beads notes (shipping DHL estimates, customs process/HS/duties, landed cost ~5/unit, forwarders DHL/Flexport/LilyGO, risks/mitigations). 3 independent codereview passes completed; findings (P3 estimates precision, P4 tariff check, opinion delivery address) filed as child beads. No new MD files. bd children created for large task. All per instructions. Ready for PO.
